Package org.vorpal.blade.framework.proxy

Class ProxyServlet

java.lang.Object
javax.servlet.GenericServlet
javax.servlet.sip.SipServlet
org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
org.vorpal.blade.framework.proxy.ProxyServlet
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, EventListener, Servlet, ServletConfig, ServletContextListener, javax.servlet.sip.SipServletListener, javax.servlet.sip.TimerListener, ProxyListener
public abstract class ProxyServlet extends AsyncSipServlet implements ProxyListener

    protected Callflow
    chooseCallflow(javax.servlet.sip.SipServletRequest request)
